tool_input.command:
for f in auxlib base coro_lib init io_lib loadlib os_lib string_lib table_lib utf8_lib; do
  /usr/bin/sed -i '' 's|use crate::state_stub::{LuaState, lua_CFunction, upvalue_index, CompareOp, LuaDebug};|use crate::state_stub::{LuaState, LuaStateStubExt as _, lua_CFunction, upvalue_index, CompareOp, LuaDebug};|' "/Users/ianmclaughlin/PycharmProjects/rustExperiments/lua-rs-port/crates/lua-stdlib/src/${f}.rs"
done
/usr/bin/sed -i '' 's|use crate::state_stub::{LuaState, lua_CFunction, upvalue_index, CompareOp, LuaDebug as DebugInfo};|use crate::state_stub::{LuaState, LuaStateStubExt as _, lua_CFunction, upvalue_index, CompareOp, LuaDebug as DebugInfo};|' /Users/ianmclaughlin/PycharmProjects/rustExperiments/lua-rs-port/crates/lua-stdlib/src/debug_lib.rs
/usr/bin/sed -i '' 's|use crate::state_stub::{LuaState, lua_CFunction as LuaCFn, upvalue_index, CompareOp, LuaDebug};|use crate::state_stub::{LuaState, LuaStateStubExt as _, lua_CFunction as LuaCFn, upvalue_index, CompareOp, LuaDebug};|' /Users/ianmclaughlin/PycharmProjects/rustExperiments/lua-rs-port/crates/lua-stdlib/src/math_lib.rs
grep -n "use crate::state_stub" /Users/ianmclaughlin/PycharmProjects/rustExperiments/lua-rs-port/crates/lua-stdlib/src/*.rs
tool_input.description: Add LuaStateStubExt to imports across stdlib modules

tool_input.command:
python3 - <<'EOF'
import re, glob, os
root = "/Users/ianmclaughlin/PycharmProjects/rustExperiments/lua-rs-port/crates/lua-stdlib/src"
files = sorted(glob.glob(os.path.join(root, "*.rs")))
changes = {}
for f in files:
    if f.endswith("state_stub.rs"): continue
    with open(f) as fh:
        src = fh.read()
    new = src
    # 1. Add ? to state.intern_str(...) when used in `let X = state.intern_str(...);` lines
    new = re.sub(r'(let\s+[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*\s*=\s*state\.intern_str\([^;]*?\));', r'\1?;', new)
    # 2. Strip ? from state.push(...)?; -> state.push(...);
    new = re.sub(r'state\.push\(([^)]*?)\)\?;', r'state.push(\1);', new)
    # 3. Strip ? from state.push(...)?, -> state.push(...),  (match-arm)
    new = re.sub(r'state\.push\(([^)]*?)\)\?,', r'state.push(\1),', new)
    # 4. Strip ? from state.set_top(...)?;
    new = re.sub(r'state\.set_top\(([^)]*?)\)\?;', r'state.set_top(\1);', new)
    # 5. Strip ? from state.new_table()?; (returns GcRef, not Result)
    new = re.sub(r'state\.new_table\(\)\?;', r'state.new_table();', new)
    # 6. state.top_idx() as i32 -> state.top_idx().0 as i32
    new = re.sub(r'state\.top_idx\(\)\s+as\s+i32', r'(state.top_idx().0 as i32)', new)
    # 7. state.top_idx() as usize -> state.top_idx().0 as usize
    new = re.sub(r'state\.top_idx\(\)\s+as\s+usize', r'(state.top_idx().0 as usize)', new)
    if new != src:
        with open(f, 'w') as fh:
            fh.write(new)
        changes[os.path.basename(f)] = src.count('\n') - new.count('\n')
print("Changed files:", changes)
EOF
